ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "total_costs" TEXT /* Total costs for all funds */,
  "exclusions" TEXT /* Exclusions and unallowable costs */,
  "indirect_costs" TEXT /* Indirect costs */,
  "total_direct_costs" TEXT /* Total direct costs */,
  "federal_programs" TEXT /* Federal program costs */,
  "non_federal_programs" TEXT /* Non-federal program costs */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial report was generated */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* The period for which the report is valid (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible for the report */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program associated with the report */,
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source associated with the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_federal_programs FOREIGN KEY ("federal_programs") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_funding_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_non_federal_programs FOREIGN KEY ("non_federal_programs") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding source (e.g., federal, non-federal) */,
  "funding_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the funding source */,
  "funding_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding source became available */,
  "funding_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding source will expire */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of funding available */,
  "funding_contact" TEXT /* Contact person for the funding source */,
  "funding_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., research, development) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the program started */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the program will end */,
  "program_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  "program_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the program */,
  "program_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the program manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "department_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department head */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounting_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accounting standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the accounting standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accounting standard */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the accounting standard */,
  "standard_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the standard became effective */,
  "standard_replaced_by" INTEGER /* ID of the standard that replaced this one (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial analytics record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., total costs, indirect costs) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was generated */,
  "analytics_period" TEXT /* The period for which the analytics data is valid (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analytics record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the analytics record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source */,
  "budget_amount" TEXT /* Budget amount */,
  "budget_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget period starts */,
  "budget_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget period ends */,
  "budget_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the budget */,
  "budget_status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., proposed, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the budget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the budget */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_funding_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget */,
  "accounting_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accounting standard */,
  "allocation_amount" TEXT /* Budget allocation amount */,
  "allocation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the budget allocation */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of the budget allocation (e.g., proposed, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the allocation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the allocation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_accounting_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("accounting_standard_id") REFERENCES accounting_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the user is associated with */,
  "user_funding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source the user is associated with */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_funding_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_funding_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
